ComponentName.description:
Newtype wrapper around the canonical component name (the `name` field of
a `ComponentEntry`). Kept small and stringy in Phase 1 so we don't have
to thread a richer type through every `ComponentEntry` call site; future
phases may promote this into `sindri-core` and tighten validation.

GitSource.description: Phase-3 stub â€” resolves components from a Git repository.

ref.description:
Branch, tag, or sha. Serialized as `ref:` in `sindri.yaml` (ADR-028
Â§"Configuration shape"). The resolver pins this to a commit sha in the
lockfile at resolution time (Phase 3).

require-signed.description:
When `true`, unsigned commits are rejected. Serialized as
`require-signed:` in `sindri.yaml` (ADR-028 Â§"Configuration shape").

subdir.description: Optional sub-directory inside the repo where `index.yaml` lives.

artifact_ref.description:
Optional manifest digest pinning the registry artifact when the
layout contains more than one. When `None`, the source picks the
first manifest whose layer media type matches the sindri index
media type (or carries the `org.sindri.registry.kind=registry-core`
annotation).

layout.description:
Path to the OCI image-layout v1.1 directory.

Serialized as `layout:` in `sindri.yaml` (ADR-028 Â§"Configuration shape").

registry_name.description:
Logical registry name used to scope cosign trust keys (mirrors
[`crate::source::OciSourceConfig::registry_name`]).

LocalPathSource.description:
A filesystem-path registry source â€” DDD-08 Â§"`LocalPathSource`".

`path` is a directory containing `index.yaml` at its root. Per-component
`component.yaml` files live under `components/<name>/component.yaml`
(or `collections/<name>/component.yaml` for collection kinds).

path.description: Root directory of the on-disk registry layout.

scope.description:
Optional component-name allow-list. When `Some`, the resolver skips
any component whose name is not in this list and falls through to the
next source in declared order.

OciSourceConfig.description:
Plain, serializable config half of [`OciSource`]. Carries the descriptor
shape from DDD-08 so `RegistrySource::Oci` can be expressed in
`sindri.yaml` without a live client.

registry_name.description:
Logical registry name used by the cosign trust loader to find
`~/.sindri/trust/<registry_name>/cosign-*.pub`. Defaults to
[`CORE_REGISTRY_NAME`] (`"sindri/core"`) â€” third-party publishers
override this.

description:
Aggregate enum that lets the resolver iterate sources without importing
every variant. New variants beyond the four canonicalized in ADR-028
require an ADR.

The serializable variants carry `*Config` payloads (plain data) rather
than the live `*Source` runtime objects so the enum can be
`Serialize/Deserialize/JsonSchema` without dragging in network/cache
state. To run a source, materialize it via the variant-specific
constructors ([`OciSource::new`] / [`LocalOciSource::new`]) or call
the [`RegistrySource::dispatch_*`] helpers which build a one-shot
runtime instance under the hood.

oneOf.description: Filesystem path source â€” the canonical inner-loop authoring path.
On-disk OCI image layout â€” the air-gap path (Phase 2).

title: RegistrySource
